find.match_belief: It's asking what they're trying to say when everyone's tired, then building the thing that says it true.

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Friction between thinking styles is the highest-leverage education. You're just building the collisions right.
profile.working_on: Running a fellowship where engineers sit in life drawing and artists debug code—they teach each other how to see wrong first.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a belief in the transformative power of collaboration, where diverse perspectives ignite deeper understanding and creativity.
